stemHtml: Which statement about the Special Position Identification (SPI) pulse is correct?

options.a: This pulse is transmitted by the SSR-interrogator in order to request for identification of a certain aircraft.
options.b: This pulse is transmitted by the transponder as a result of the pilot pushing the IDENT-button.
options.c: This pulse is transmitted by the SSR-interrogator if it is suspected that responses are received from aircraft which are located in the direction of the side lobes of the interrogator antenna.
options.d: This pulse is transmitted automatically every time the transponder responds to a mode A interrogation.
